topic: your phone is tracking you — here's how to stop it
hook: your phone is tracking you — here's how to stop it — which side are you on?

script_segments.text: your phone is tracking you — here's how to stop it — which side are you on?
script_segments.visual_direction: Split screen. Two options. Text: 'PICK ONE'.

script_segments.text: Left: the old way of doing your phone is tracking you — here's how to stop it. Slow. Painful. Right: the new way. Clean. Fast. Choose wisely.
script_segments.visual_direction: Quick pros of each side flash as text. Point left, then right.

script_segments.text: If you're still on the left... we need to talk. Comment your pick.
script_segments.visual_direction: Point to your pick. Wink or nod. Text: 'Comment yours'. Loop-friendly.

caption: your phone is tracking you — here's how to stop it — which side are you on? Full breakdown in this video. Save for later.
sound_suggestion: game show buzzer / choice sound effect
